phrases.intent_en: Do you have an English tour today?
phrases.text_local: Vous avez une visite en anglais aujourd'hui ?
phrases.pronunciation: voo zah-VAY oon vee-ZEET on on-GLAY oh-zhoor-DWEE
phrases.cultural_note: Cellar tours are often timed and can sell out; booking ahead is safest.

phrases.intent_en: Is tasting included in this visit?
phrases.text_local: La dégustation est incluse dans cette visite ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah day-goos-tah-SYON an-KLOOZ dahn set vee-ZEET
phrases.cultural_note: Most house tours include tasting tiers; check how many cuvées are included.

phrases.intent_en: Is the cellar much colder than outside?
phrases.text_local: Les caves sont beaucoup plus fraîches que dehors ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay kav son boh-KOO ploo fresh kuh duh-OR
phrases.cultural_note: Champagne cellars are cool year-round; bringing a light layer is smart.

phrases.intent_en: Can I buy a bottle to take with me?
phrases.text_local: Je peux acheter une bouteille à emporter ?
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh puh zah-shuh-TAY oon boo-TAY ah on-por-TAY
phrases.cultural_note: Some houses have boutique limits on rare labels during busy periods.

responses.english: Yes, at the shop on the way out.
responses.phonetic: wee ah lah boo-TEEK ahn sor-TAHN
responses.local: Oui, à la boutique en sortant.
